titleStmt.title: SII 9.692: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 692. (A.R. No. 32 of 1915.) ON THE IRON LAMP-POST SET UP IN THE SOUTHERN COURT-YARD OF THE MALLIKARJUNA TEMPLE AT SRISAILAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1524, Śubhakṛit, Māgha, ba. 5 (?), Śivarātre, corresponding to A.D. 1603 January 21, Friday, in the reign of Veṅkaṭapatirāya. It records that Chikayya Chiga-Chiga-Chikayya, son of the carpenter Doḍḍa-Halagayya of Heñjeru living in Nāgēnahaḷḷi, situated in the district under Mudiyaṇa-Nāyaka, set up the iron lamp-post before the god Mallikārjuna of Parvata for the prosperity of Mudiyapa-Nāyaka. The god is stated to have showered gold on the Chōḷa chief of Niḍugallasīme.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . srīvijeyā
bdudasālivāha
nasakavaruśa 1524
neya subakṛtu saṁ
vacarada māga ba 5
sivarātre pu(ṁ)ṇyakā
ladalu srīveṁkaṭha
pati
rāyaru mutinaga
dhige siṁhāsanada
lu prutvīrājyaṁgai
Utiralu niḍugalla sī
mevoḷagaḷa cōḷarā
yage hoṁna maḷe
garadaṁta
heṁjara baḍagi
kettaṇeyadoḍa
halagaiyana maga
cikaiya cigaciga
cikaiyanu mudi
yaṇanāyakara sī
me voḷagaḷa nā
gēnahaḷīlidhu
mudhiyapanā
yakarige stira
rājyavāgali yeṁ
du
parvatada mallikā
rjunage māḍida sē
ve kabbunada dīpamā
leya kaṁba svāmi
ge samārpitau
yidu keṁcaina ba
raha śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.692 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
